requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL make durable control signals the source of truth for fiber wake, resume, and interrupt scheduling.

case.given: A fiber is suspended on a typed wait reason
case.when: A durable control signal that satisfies that wait reason is enqueued into the owning actor mailbox
case.then: The orchestrator SHALL mark the fiber ready or record a pending resume in the same control transaction
case.and: The next scheduler tick SHALL be able to continue the fiber without requiring transcript-tail inference

case.given: An actor fiber is currently running
case.when: A non-interrupt ordinary mailbox message arrives
case.then: The runtime SHALL enqueue the message without re-entering the actor handler
case.and: The actor SHALL drain the message at the next safe boundary according to mailbox priority

case.given: An actor fiber is currently running
case.when: A wake message such as LLM done, tool done, child done, or human input arrives
case.then: The runtime SHALL persist and enqueue the message
case.and: The runtime SHALL NOT concurrently execute a second handler for the same actor
The runtime SHALL make the message visible to the current or next cooperative drain boundary

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL model interrupt-capable messages as high-priority control signals that enter actor mailboxes and cooperatively abort current in-flight work.

case.given: A fiber is running or suspended with an in-flight LLM operation
case.then: The signal SHALL be persisted and enqueued in the actor control mailbox with interrupt priority
case.and: The runtime SHALL abort the active LLM operation when an abort controller is available
The fiber SHALL observe cancellation at a safe boundary and terminate or suspend according to the cancel policy

case.given: A fiber is waiting on a tool operation
case.then: The runtime SHALL mark the in-flight operation as cancelled
case.and: The runtime SHALL abort the tool when it supports AbortSignal
Any late tool completion SHALL be ignored or recorded as a cancelled observation using op id and epoch checks

case.given: An actor is currently inside a handler execution
case.then: The runtime SHALL NOT re-enter the actor handler concurrently
case.and: The runtime SHALL set an interrupt state that the current execution observes cooperatively

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL use typed wait reasons for cooperative async boundaries and reserve generic external waiting for true idle or external-human waits.

case.given: A cooperative step suspends for LLM, tool, compression, questionnaire parsing, child completion, or human input
case.then: The fiber SHALL contain a typed waitingReason describing the awaited event class
case.and: The cooperative exec state SHALL contain the matching op id or durable wait condition when applicable

case.given: A fiber is suspended on an internal async operation
case.then: The runtime SHALL NOT use generic external as the only wait reason
